title: 信息日报 2026-06-15

headline.title: 美伊达成停战协议，全球股市大涨、油价暴跌
headline.summary: 美伊宣布结束敌对状态并重开霍尔木兹海峡，投资者对能源供应担忧缓解，全球股市和债券反弹，原油跌至三个月低点。
headline.title_en: Stocks Rally With Bonds as Iran Deal Spurs Relief: Markets Wrap
headline.summary_en: After the US and Iran announced an end to hostilities and reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, global stocks and bonds rallied while oil fell to a three-month low as energy supply fears eased.
headline.original_title: Stocks Rally With Bonds as Iran Deal Spurs Relief: Markets Wrap
headline.reason: 该事件同时涉及国际事务和财经理财两个大类，影响全球金融市场，是当日最具冲击力的新闻。
headline.reason_en: This event spans both World Affairs and Finance & Wealth categories, impacting global financial markets, making it the most impactful news of the day.

warnings: LLM subsection finance/markets-assets ignored duplicate URL: https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-06-14/us-futures-climb-oil-falls-on-iran-peace-deal-markets-wrap
